if the transform’s basis is conformal, meaning it preserves angles and distance ratios, and may only be composed of rotation and uniform scale. Returns
if the transform’s basis has non-uniform scale or shear/skew. This can be used to validate if the transform is non-distorted, which is important for physics and other use cases.

Types that conform to VariantRepresentable can be stored directly in
with no conversion.  These include all of the Variant types from Godot (for
SwiftGodot.Object) as well as the built-in Swift types UInt8, Int64 and Double.
Structs and scalar types use their own layout for storage.
